title: iFealClear Sink Plug Replacement, Suitable for Bathroom Sink with Overflow, Stainless Steel Bathroom Basin Waste with Pull Rod, G 1 1/4''（40.4mm), Pop Up Sink Plug with Lever, Chrome
features: [Top-Tier Drainage & Retention Performance] This Bathroom Basin Push Pull Rod Lever features smooth push-pull lever operation, enabling rapid clog-free drainage and tight leak-proof water retention, eliminating annoying water pooling and stagnant water troubles for your sink; the reliable Pop Up Plug design ensures seamless switch between draining and filling every time.

[Long-lasting Rust-Resistant Premium Material] Crafted from premium sturdy anti-rust material, this Basin Sink Pop-Up Waste Plug resists corrosion and daily wear, ensures long-lasting use without deformation, and is easy to wipe clean for hassle-free maintenance, far more durable than ordinary sink accessories.

[Precision Universal Fit for UK Sinks] Designed for basins with G1 1/4'' (40.4mm) drain holes, this Pop Up Sink Plug Replacement perfectly fits most standard UK bathroom basins, vanity sinks and utility sinks, compatible with both ceramic and stone sink types for wide application, ideal for most household sink setups.

[Hygienic Touch-Free Core Advantage] This Bathroom Basin Push Pull Rod Lever boasts touch-free lever control that keeps your hands away from dirty stagnant water, reducing germ contact effectively and bringing a cleaner, more hygienic daily bathroom use experience, making it a smarter upgrade than traditional sink plugs.

[Tool-Free Quick Installation (Pro Tip Included)] The tool-free quick installation design allows one-step pop-in fitting for this Push Pull Rod Lever Kit and Sink Plug Replacement, no complex operation required; we recommend wearing gloves during installation for extra convenience and hygiene, and you can finish assembly in minutes, even without professional skills.
